title: Power & Precision: Back In Time
description: Discover medieval magic and technology in the eagerly awaited "Power & Precision: Back In Time." Experience unique adventures with custom origins, master innovative machinery using the Create mod, and confront enhanced endermen and creepers.
body:
"Power & Precision Modpack: Back In Time" is the highly anticipated fourth installment in the renowned modpack series. This immersive Minecraft experience takes players on a journey through time, embracing a loosely medieval theme with a wealth of extraordinary features.

The pack boasts the Origins mod, enhanced with custom origins tailored specifically for "Back In Time," allowing players to embark on unique adventures with diverse abilities. The Create mod, coupled with carefully selected addons, provides an intricate and innovative machinery system for players to explore and master.

To expand the realms of exploration, "Back In Time" incorporates the Better End and Better Nether mods, introducing a plethora of new biomes and terrains in both dimensions. Brace yourself for encounters with revamped endermen and creepers, thanks to the Overhauled Creepers and Overhauled Endermen mods, adding an extra layer of challenge and excitement.

Delving further into the medieval theme, vanilla Minecraft structures receive an overhaul, immersing players in a world reminiscent of times past. The Regions Unexplored mod enhances exploration with an impressive array of 70+ new biomes, each with its own unique environment to uncover. Brace yourself for epic battles against incredibly powerful bosses scattered across the diverse landscapes.

Embracing the magical essence of medieval times, the modpack introduces the Wizards mod alongside Paladins & Priests, providing players with mystical powers and divine abilities. Unleash your magical prowess as you traverse the enchanted landscapes.

For community engagement, "Back In Time" offers a dedicated public server accessible through the Succ's Chilly Cave Discord community. Join the server to connect with fellow adventurers, share experiences, and conquer the challenges presented by this intricately crafted modpack. Immerse yourself in the medieval magic and technological wonders of "Power & Precision Modpack: Back In Time."

### Be aware that the FTB mods are not included in the pack itself, as they aren’t hosted on Modrinth. So, when you join the Minecraft server, it will ask you if you want to update your mods. All that does is download FTB Chunks, FTB Teams, FTB Essentials, FTB Library, FTB Quests, FTB Ultimine, and FTB XMod Compat.
